name: zeus-herald
description: Reliable camera event notifications via Telegram Bot and ntfy (successor to upcam-client / SnapShotter)

scripts.test: node scripts/check-banned-stack.mjs && node --test test/smoke.test.js test/config.test.js test/notifiers.test.js test/banned-stack.test.js test/runtime.test.js test/ingest.test.js test/motion.test.js test/e2e-pipeline.test.js
scripts.lint: node --check src/index.js src/config.js src/logger.js src/app.js src/queue.js src/runtimeSupervisor.js src/shutdown.js src/ingest-cli.js src/ingest/config.js src/ingest/reolink.js src/ingest/upcam.js src/ingest/writer.js src/ingest/index.js src/motion-cli.js src/motion/config.js src/motion/metrics.js src/motion/state.js src/motion/decide.js src/motion/processor.js src/motion/index.js src/notifiers/base.js src/notifiers/telegram.js src/notifiers/ntfy.js src/notifiers/hub.js src/notifiers/index.js

author: zeus-herald contributors
